title: Septic Tank Servicers and Sewer Pipe Cleaners
description: Clean and repair septic tanks, sewer lines, or drains. May patch walls and partitions of tank, replace damaged drain tile, or repair breaks in underground piping.

tasks.text: Communicate with supervisors and other workers, using equipment such as wireless phones, pagers, or radio telephones.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive trucks to transport crews, materials, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect manholes to locate sewer line stoppages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate sewer cleaning equipment, including power rodders, high-velocity water jets, sewer flushers, bucket machines, wayne balls, and vac-alls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and keep records of actions taken, including maintenance and repair work.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Clean and repair septic tanks, sewer lines, or related structures such as manholes, culverts, and catch basins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure excavation sites, using plumbers' snakes, tapelines, or lengths of cutting heads within sewers, and mark areas for digging.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Service, adjust, and make minor repairs to equipment, machines, and attachments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate problems, using specially designed equipment, and mark where digging must occur to reach damaged tanks or pipes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Dig out sewer lines manually, using shovels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and disinfect domestic basements and other areas flooded by sewer stoppages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Withdraw cables from pipes and examine them for evidence of mud, roots, grease, and other deposits indicating broken or clogged sewer lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Ensure that repaired sewer line joints are tightly sealed before backfilling begins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rotate cleaning rods manually, using turning pins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install rotary knives on flexible cables mounted on machine reels, according to the diameters of pipes to be cleaned.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start machines to feed revolving cables or rods into openings, stopping machines and changing knives to conform to pipe sizes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Update sewer maps and manhole charts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cover repaired pipes with dirt, and pack backfilled excavations, using air and gasoline tampers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut damaged sections of pipe with cutters, remove broken sections from ditches, and replace pipe sections, using pipe sleeves.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Requisition or order tools and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Break asphalt and other pavement so that pipes can be accessed, using airhammers, picks, and shovels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tap mainline sewers to install sewer saddles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
